creator: sahil@FreeBSD.org
text: This is hardly pressing, but I believe it would be nice to include an explicit reference to the location of the addkey.sh script somewhere in the Committer's Guide.  It is not difficult to find after a little poking around, and new committers are typically directed to the script by their mentors, but we explicitly note where to find the addport script, so perhaps it's suitable to do the same thing with addkey.sh.
